seo.title: FocusFlow — AI-powered productivity for deep work

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

hero.subtitle: FocusFlow is an AI productivity OS that organizes your tasks, defends your focus, and quietly nudges you toward the work that actually matters.
hero.aiCardBefore: Your calendar is clear until 11:00. This is your best window for

bento.subtitle: Designed to protect attention rather than capture it. Every pixel earns its place.
bento.bigTitleLine2: your energy, not just your calendar.
bento.bigDesc: Suggestions based on when you actually do your best work — never generic, never noisy.
bento.cardPrioritizationDesc: Tasks ranked by impact and energy — not the loudest tab.
bento.cardFocusDesc: One-click deep work. Zero notifications, ambient sound.
bento.cardCalendarDesc: Your day blocks itself around real meetings and energy.
bento.cardReviewsDesc: Weekly insights that surface what to drop, not just do.
bento.cardPrivateDesc: End-to-end encrypted. Your notes never train anyone's model.

blocks.title: Gentle start
blocks.body: Morning brief: 3 priorities, weather, energy check.

blocks.title: Deep work · 90m
blocks.body: Q3 product narrative. Notifications muted, music started.

blocks.title: Shallow batch
blocks.body: Replies, reviews, quick decisions — all in one sweep.

blocks.title: Real lunch
blocks.body: FocusFlow refuses to schedule meetings here. You're welcome.

blocks.title: Collaboration
blocks.body: 1:1 with Maya, design critique, async check-ins.

blocks.title: Wind down
blocks.body: AI prepares tomorrow's plan from today's signals.

quotes.quote: FocusFlow is the first productivity app I haven't quit after a week. It's quiet in all the right ways — and the AI suggestions feel like a thoughtful colleague.
quotes.name: Lena Park

quotes.quote: The AI suggestions feel like a thoughtful colleague. My deep work hours doubled.
quotes.name: Marcus Hill

quotes.quote: Replaced three apps. Gave me back my mornings. The weekly review alone is worth it.
quotes.name: Aisha Rahman

cta.subtitle: Join 12,418 professionals who replaced anxious to-do lists with calm, intentional days.
